channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Philippines moves to secure access for pomelo exports to Japan by end-2026 following bilateral talks
item.description: The Philippine government is actively working to gain access for local pomelos to the Japanese market by the end of 2026, according to the Department of Agriculture (DA). Agriculture Secretary Francis...

item.title: President Ruto Says He Will Accept 2027 Election Outcome, Urges Kenyans to Trust God
item.description: Nairobi – President William Ruto has told Kenyans that he will accept the results of the 2027 General Election, whether or not it includes a second term for him. Speaking at the National Prayer Breakf...

item.title: University of Fort Hare initiates disciplinary proceedings against Vice-Chancellor over alleged governance breaches
item.description: The University of Fort Hare has formally instituted disciplinary proceedings against its Vice-Chancellor, Professor Sakhela Buhlungu, following allegations of gross misconduct, insubordination, and br...

item.title: Parliament debates alleged opposition aide abduction amid police accountability and US sanctions concerns
item.description: The Tanzanian Parliament in Dodoma witnessed heated debate after the alleged abduction of David Joseph Mghanja, also known as Djumbe, who is an aide to detained opposition leader Tundu Lissu. The inci...

item.title: US funding cuts leave Ebola research network unable to support outbreak response in Africa
item.description: A growing Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo’s Ituri province is unfolding without the support of a key international research network, after its funding was cut by the Trump administr...

item.title: CNN panel debates criticism of White House UFC event tied to Trump’s birthday celebration
item.description: A CNN discussion featured a heated exchange over criticism surrounding plans for a UFC event being staged at the White House South Lawn. The event, reportedly tied to the nation’s 250th anniversary an...

item.title: Fans praise immersive nightclub mission featuring Chase & Status in ‘007: First Light’
item.description: The newly released James Bond video game ‘007: First Light’, developed by IO Interactive, has attracted significant attention for one of its standout early missions set in a nightclub environment. In ...

item.title: Kenyan Nurse Judy Plans Return to Africa to Join Family and Transition to Full-Time Homemaker
item.description: US-based Kenyan nurse Judy has revealed her intention to relocate back to Africa after spending several years working in the United States. Having moved to the US around 2022 in search of better oppor...

item.title: Fire at Utumishi Girls Academy Leaves 16 Dead and Dozens Injured
item.description: A tragic fire erupted at Utumishi Girls’ Academy in Gilgil, Nakuru County, at around 3am, destroying a dormitory and claiming the lives of 16 students while injuring over 70 others. The incident has l...

item.title: Bruce Springsteen announces political music festival and protest-themed performance near Washington, D.C. ahead of Election Day
item.description: Bruce Springsteen used a recent concert at Nationals Park in Washington, D.C. to deliver a strongly political message and announce plans for a large-scale music and activism event scheduled for Octobe...

item.title: TD Bank reports strong Q2 earnings and increases shareholder dividend
item.description: TD Bank has reported a second-quarter profit of $4.25 billion, reflecting solid financial performance during the period, and has announced an increase to its dividend for shareholders. The results, re...

item.title: Tanzania to host Sh7 trillion investment summit linking global investors with major development projects
item.description: Tanzania is preparing to host a major international investment summit aimed at attracting global and local investors to finance key development projects worth around $2.85 billion, equivalent to Sh7 t...

item.title: Mandy, Indiana Featured on the Cover of NME Magazine May/June 2026 Issue
item.description: The May/June 2026 edition of NME Magazine has been released, featuring industrial-dance band Mandy, Indiana on the cover. This issue is bundled with Guitar.com Magazine, which showcases artist Grace B...

item.title: Ombudsman files new plunder case vs Jinggoy Estrada over alleged flood control kickbacks
item.description: Kinasuhan ng Ombudsman si Senator Jinggoy Estrada ng plunder at dalawang bilang ng graft kaugnay sa umano’y P573 milyong kickbacks mula sa mga flood control projects. Ito na ang ikatlong beses sa loob...

item.title: Siddaramaiah Resigns as Karnataka Chief Minister, Declines Rajya Sabha Offer to Continue as MLA
item.description: In a major development in Karnataka politics, Chief Minister Siddaramaiah tendered his resignation on Thursday, bringing an end to the internal power tussle with his deputy DK Shivakumar. After meetin...

item.title: Saleem Rashid: From Orphaned Teen to Viral Home Chef in Durban
item.description: Saleem Rashid, a 52-year-old from Clare Estate in Durban, began cooking out of necessity after being orphaned as a young boy and living in an orphanage. His passion for cooking grew while living with ...

item.title: Goldman and Lander clash over Israel policy in competitive NYC congressional primary
item.description: A heated debate over Israel has become a central dividing line in the Democratic primary between U.S. Rep. Dan Goldman and former New York City Comptroller Brad Lander in a closely watched Manhattan-B...

item.title: Matthias Forster’s Photographic Exploration of Human Control and Chance in Everyday Landscapes
item.description: This LensCulture feature presents the work of Swiss photographer Matthias Forster and his series titled “Homo Faber and Divine Providence,” which explores the relationship between human control and th...

item.title: Regional parties support OPAPRU neutrality ahead of BARMM parliamentary elections
item.description: Regional political parties in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) have expressed support and appreciation for the Office of the Presidential Adviser on Peace, Reconciliation an...

item.title: Key developments on May 28: DOJ probe into E. Jean Carroll, renewed Iran–US strikes, Trump health update, redistricting shifts, and Laos cave rescue effort
item.description: This briefing outlines five major news developments for May 28 covering legal, geopolitical, political, and humanitarian stories. First, the U.S. Department of Justice has opened a criminal investigat...
